description: Creates a new Job Title in the specified company.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Schema for a Job Title ID response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Job Title.

schema.description: Request body schema for creating a new Job Title.

name.description: The name of the Job Title.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs for which Groups this Job Title should be available to. If `globally_accessible` is set to `true`, this value can be an empty array.

globally_accessible.description: Controls whether the Job Title should be globally available to all current and future Groups.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Job Title. Helps with categorization and visual distinction.

type.description: Indicates whether the Job Title is salaried or hourly.

hourly_rate.description: The rate value that will be factored into cost calculations for any person who has this job title applied and doesn't already have a standalone hourly wage value. This is also handy for costing man...
